name: NodeGoat SSRF — server fetches an attacker-supplied URL via needle.get

provenance.note: Vulnerable side is verbatim-real NodeGoat master code (displayResearch concatenates req.query.url straight into needle.get with no allowlist). NodeGoat ships no committed/commented fix for this route, so the safe baseline (-) side is a reconstructed minimal host-validation fix; hence kind=synthesized.

notes: HTTP client is needle (not axios/fetch); B-04 covers SSRF across all HTTP clients. NodeGoat SSRF tutorial.
